world.title: Fitr with troops in newly liberated town in Lower Shabelle region
world.description: Mogadishu (HOL) — Somali President Hassan Sheikh Mohamud performed Eid al-Fitr prayers Friday with units of the Somali Armed Forces stationed in Gendershe, a coastal town in Lower Shabelle recently retaken from al-Shabab.

world.title: Somaliland President urges price restraint, peace in Sool and Sanaag regions during Eid address
world.description: Hargeisa (HOL) — Somaliland President Abdirahman Mohamed Abdillahi Irro joined hundreds of worshippers in Hargeisa on Friday morning for Eid al-Fitr prayers, using the occasion to call for economic restraint and renewed peace in regions affected by recent clan clashes.

business.title: Does Rocket Lab’s Billion Dollar ATM and Defense Wins Reshape the Bull Case for RKLB?
business.description:
Rocket Lab recently completed its 84th Electron launch, deploying Synspective’s eighth StriX SAR satellite from New Zealand and extending their partnership to 27 dedicated missions through 2028.
Away from orbit, Rocket Lab’s US$190 million hypersonic testing contract and up to US$1 billion equity program highlight its growing role in defense and capital-intensive expansion.
